title: FDA Halts Release of New Drug Rejection Letters (CRLs)
headline: FDA paused the release of new complete response letters, reversing its 2025 'radical transparency' policy after a citizen petition.
key_facts: Fierce Biotech story timestamped July 8, 2026, 1:33pm; Endpoints framing: 'HHS lays groundwork for new FDA rule on releasing the CRLs'; follows a citizen petition; concrete example: the Sobi CRL (June 26, 2026) was NOT published — the tangible instance of the reversed transparency policy; CONTRADICTION FLAG: Fierce says FDA 'halts release' (a pause) while Endpoints frames it as forward-building rulemaking — net action unverified

title: Sino Biopharm Signs Respiratory Deals with AstraZeneca and GSK
headline: Sino Biopharmaceutical signed separate respiratory deals with AstraZeneca (up to $1.9B) and GSK (China rights to Trelegy and Anoro Ellipta), announced Wednesday July 8.
key_facts: AstraZeneca deal: 'up to $1.9B' for a respiratory/COPD asset; CONTRADICTION FLAG: researcher notes cite $2.1B and a PDE3/4 inhibitor (TQC3721) in COPD — both UNVERIFIED against source snippets, which only confirm 'up to $1.9B'; GSK deal: CTTQ (Chia Tai Tianqing, Sino Biopharm subsidiary) gets mainland China commercialization rights for Trelegy Ellipta (fluticasone furoate/umeclidinium/vilanterol) and Anoro Ellipta (umeclidinium/vilanterol); Trelegy approved in China 2019 for COPD maintenance, label expanded 2026 to asthma — first/only single-inhaler triple therapy in China for both; part of a wave of UK-pharma/China tie-ups amid US scrutiny

title: Pfizer Downgraded to Hold on Delayed Pipeline Catalysts
headline: Pfizer was downgraded to Hold on delayed pipeline catalysts, management changes, and reduced near-term re-rating potential.
key_facts: Downgraded to Hold on July 6 (HSBC per researcher notes, carried by Benzinga); cited delayed pipeline catalysts, management changes, reduced near-term re-rating potential

title: Oruka Drops After Fairmount Sells $300M Stake
headline: Oruka Therapeutics shares dropped after hours after Fairmount sold 3.55 million shares — a $300 million stake — via SEC filing.
key_facts: Fairmount sold 3.55 million shares / a $300 million stake via SEC filing; shares dropped after hours; insider/large-holder exit

title: Biohaven Positions Taldefgrobep Alfa Against Lilly in Muscle-Sparing Obesity
headline: Biohaven is positioning its muscle-building drug taldefgrobep alfa against Lilly in muscle-sparing obesity, with a Phase 2 readout due in the second half of 2026.
key_facts: Biohaven Phase 2 trial of taldefgrobep alfa to read out later this year (2H 2026) — NOT yet out; this is a preview/positioning piece, not a data readout; Lilly previously halted a bimagrumab study, initial results expected ~April 2026 (via Versanis, acquired 2023); competitors in muscle-sparing/anti-myostatin: Lilly, Regeneron, Scholar Rock

title: Tampa General Sues Lilly Over 340B Restrictions
headline: Tampa General sued Eli Lilly over 340B restrictions on July 7, involving Mounjaro pricing.
key_facts: Suit filed July 7; involves Mounjaro pricing detail per researcher notes; specific figures not in source snippets; US regulatory/legal 340B story

title: Vera Therapeutics Atacicept Wins FDA Nod in IgA Nephropathy
headline: Vera Therapeutics' atacicept won FDA approval for IgA nephropathy as the first dual-target inhibitor, giving it a roughly 5-month head start over Vertex.
key_facts: atacicept won FDA nod for IgAN, July 7, 12:23pm; first dual-target inhibitor; ~5-month head start over Vertex

title: Bristol Myers Krazati Confirmatory Study Fails in Colorectal Cancer
headline: Bristol Myers' Krazati confirmatory study failed in colorectal cancer, reported July 7.
key_facts: Confirmatory fail in colorectal cancer, July 7, 10:46am

title: Novartis Dismisses 322 More Staff at US Headquarters
headline: Novartis dismissed 322 more staff at its US headquarters on July 7.
key_facts: 322 more staff dismissed at US HQ, July 7

title: Drugmaker Caught Faking Doctors' Petition to Evade China Price Cut
headline: A drugmaker was caught faking a doctors' petition in an attempt to evade a China price cut.
key_facts: Fierce, July 8, 11:31am; drugmaker not named in captured text

title: Keenova Xiaflex Trial Sets Up Third Indication
headline: Keenova's trial results set up a third indication for Xiaflex.
key_facts: Trial results set up 3rd indication for Xiaflex; Fierce July 8, 11:27am

title: Satellos Duchenne Pill — Early Look in Adults
headline: Satellos offered an early look at its Duchenne pill in adults ahead of pediatric data.
key_facts: Early look in adults ahead of pediatric data; Endpoints (~12h before capture)

title: Evonik Announces $100M Upgrade to Indiana Drug Substance Plant
headline: Evonik announced a $100 million upgrade to its Indiana drug substance plant.
key_facts: $100M upgrade to Indiana drug substance plant; July 8, 10:22am
